violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs and raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked food and produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

(Chicken wings) was observed held at (98) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165 or above Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (outside refuse) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Queso Hoja was observed from an unapproved source. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

(Duck eggs ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Hot hold door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

Outside refuse area observed with an accumulation of pallets, milk crates, and other debris. Outdoor refuses must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Cooked beans was observed held at (57) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, beans was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed. Proper cooling procedures were discussed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The floors in the (kitchen prep area ) are constructed of (concrete) which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

Hose was observed attached to faucet at handwashing sink in hot food counter area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Handwashing signage was lacking from women's restroom in basement. A sign or poster that notifies FOOD EMPLOYEES to wash their hands shall be provided at all HANDWASHING SINKS. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed knives in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Chicharron was observed held at (47-52) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (Chicharron) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed about proper cooling procedures. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Bagged pork was observed thawing on the a cart. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing.PIC moved food product to refrigerator unit for proper thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Knives and food scraper is stored on an unclean surface (between prep unit and wall) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the back receiving area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
Produce walk in cooler located back storage area was not in good repair(ripped door skirts). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sinks). New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with an accumulation of debris: 1.food storage buckets have soil residue. 2.produce display coolers observed with food debris, soil residue, dust, and/or other debris. 3.dairy open case cooler have food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The floors in the (kitchen prep area) are constructed of (concrete) which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The following physical facilities has an accumulation debris:1.walls in all departments observed with soil residue.2.fans in produce cooler observed with dust.3.floors in all walk in coolers observed with food residue and/or debris.4.back heater storage room is located observed with clutter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair:1.door frame in meat observed with exposed wood and insulation.2.pipes in back heater area have exposed insulation3.light shield observed hanging in meat walk in cooler.4.door frame in produce walk in cooler observed with exposed wood.5.ceiling vents in meat display cooler are detached from ceiling.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
